texto: For femmes, that evolving feminist thought reacquainted us with something we kind of knew already: men and women might mistake us for “just girls” when they see our makeup and fashions, but we were/are actually guerrilla warriors, fighting undercover in the war to save women from the continuing campaign to make us irrelevant fluff.
explicacao: Citação de Jewelle L. Gómez sobre temas ligados a familia. “For femmes, that evolving feminist thought reacquainted us with something we kind of knew already…” articula familia, feminism, femme em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como femme.
